rice.name: Rice (चावल)
rice.seasons: Kharif (Jun-Nov). Rabi in some South Indian regions.
rice.soil: Clayey loam, alluvial soil. pH 5.5-7.0. Needs water-retentive soil.
rice.water: High. 1200-1800mm rainfall. Requires standing water during most stages.
rice.varieties: North: PB 1509, Pusa Basmati 1121, PR 126. South: BPT 5204, Swarna. East: Swarna-Sub1, Sahbhagi Dhan.
rice.tips: Use certified seeds 40-50 kg/ha. Transplant 25-day seedlings. Apply nitrogen in 3 splits: basal, tillering, panicle initiation. SRI method: single seedling, wider spacing.
rice.common_pests: Brown Planthopper (hopper burn, spray Imidacloprid). Blast (diamond lesions, spray Tricyclazole). Sheath Blight (oval spots, spray Validamycin).

wheat.name: Wheat (गेहूं)
wheat.soil: Loam to clay loam. Well-drained. pH 6.0-7.5.
wheat.water: Moderate. 4-6 irrigations. Critical at CRI (21 days), tillering, flowering.
wheat.temperature: 20-25°C during growth. Cool during grain filling.
wheat.sowing: October-November. Optimal: mid-November. Each week delay after Nov 15 loses ~50 kg/ha.
wheat.tips: Seed rate: 100 kg/ha normal, 125 kg/ha late sowing. First irrigation at 21 days (CRI stage) critical. Apply 1/3 N + full P&K basal. Remaining N in 2 splits.
wheat.common_pests: Rust (yellow/brown/black pustules, spray Propiconazole). Aphids (green insects on ears, spray Dimethoate).

cotton.name: Cotton (कपास)
cotton.tips: 90x45 cm spacing for Bt hybrids. Apply 120:60:60 NPK/ha. Intercrop with short-duration pulses. Pick in morning when bolls fully open.
cotton.common_pests: Bollworm (holes in bolls, spray Chlorantraniliprole). Whitefly (white flies under leaves, spray Thiamethoxam).

tomato.name: Tomato (टमाटर)
tomato.seasons: Year-round varies. Kharif Jun-Jul, Rabi Oct-Nov, Spring Jan-Feb.
tomato.soil: Well-drained sandy loam to clay. pH 6.0-7.0.
tomato.temperature: 20-30°C. No fruit set above 40°C or below 10°C.
tomato.tips: Staking increases yield 20-30%. Calcium spray prevents blossom end rot. Harvest at breaker stage for transport. Rotate with non-solanaceous crops.
tomato.common_pests: Early Blight (concentric ring spots, spray Mancozeb). Late Blight (water-soaked patches, spray Metalaxyl). Fruit Borer (holes in fruit, spray Emamectin).

maize.name: Maize (मक्का)
maize.soil: Well-drained loam to sandy loam. pH 5.8-8.0.
maize.water: Moderate. Critical at tasseling and grain filling.
maize.tips: Seed rate 20-25 kg/ha. Row spacing 60x20 cm. Earthing up at 30-35 days prevents lodging. Dry grains to 12-14% for safe storage.
